content: org.gnome.desktop.interface is the canonical GSettings schema GTK consults on non-GNOME Wayland compositors. Verified directly on target machine: gsettings/dconf already hold gtk-theme='adw-gtk3-dark' and color-scheme='prefer-dark' correctly, and xdg-desktop-portal-gtk.service is active -- the GSettings/portal layer is NOT the broken link in this repo's pipeline.
